failures.description: The Executor invented an answer not grounded in the ProductCatalogSearch result, changing the result count from 4 to 11 and fabricating record 0000000000.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to answer which available bamboo-deck Skateboards cost more than $194.56, using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool call at index 3 returned 4 matching items with item_ids and prices. At index 4, the Executor produced the unsupported answer "There are 11 options available, per record 0000000000." The count 11 and record 0000000000 are absent from all prior user input and tool output, and the answer omits the actual returned items. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved it.
